name: computer
description:
Windows Computer Use plugin for Codex++.

Aliases: @computer, computer, computer use, windows computer use.

Use this plugin whenever the user explicitly mentions @computer or asks Codex to control Windows desktop apps. It should use the Windows Computer Use MCP server supplied by the co.bennett.windows-computer-use Codex++ tweak.

interface.longDescription: Windows Computer Use lets Codex inspect and operate visible Windows desktop apps using screenshots, UI Automation target dumps, keyboard and mouse input, and a visible software cursor overlay. It is backed by a Windows-local Codex++ MCP server and does not connect to a remote host.
defaultPrompt: Open YouTube and search for the latest Joe Rogan clips
List visible Windows apps and dump their buttons
